title: Bounties Paid Off
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Amount), 0) AS total FROM PayBounty WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Faction AS label, COALESCE(SUM(Amount), 0) AS value FROM PayBounty WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Faction ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} Cr spent clearing bounties during the report period. Paying off bounties is the cost of doing illegal business — large payouts represent real credits permanently spent to restore your standing, and the faction split shows which police forces were the most expensive to appease.
details.help: PayBounty Amount is the credit cost paid. total drives the title as the total clearance spend.

tagLines: Bounty clearance payment records compiled. Faction criminal record clearance expenditure noted.
It cost you real credits to get your name off those lists. Whether it was worth it depends on what you earned first.
Paid in full. The charge was dropped. The incident remains in your journal forever.
